judge_policy.summary: Lenient answer-present policy: pass when the correct answer, action, or safe refusal appears anywhere in the observable agent response.

scenarios.reason: Agent booked the appointment and provided a Bright Smile Dental confirmation id.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Bright Smile Dental. This is Area. How can I help?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: I’d like to schedule an appointment for a chipped filling next Monday at 4 PM.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Booked for Monday, June one at four p.m. Confirmation BSD one zero zero two

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Thanks, that sounds good. See you then. Goodbye.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're all set, Jordan. Have a great day. Goodbye
